case_title: KOVALEK ANTHONY VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-02-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOVALEK ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,008.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
